---
title: "UFO_Data"
author: "Tyler Guerrero, Emanuel Padilla, Cameron Snyder"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
ufo_data <- read.csv("ufo_data.csv")

glimpse(ufo_data)
```
